testsuite.name: s2s.zipcode

testcase.name: purchaseApi
testcase.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- EUR select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 100.0 ✅ Boundary amount provided explicitly: 100.0 Generated First Name: john233 Purchase created successfully with ID: 6981ea24b0f4598c7a5573e9 Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true PASS → Payment succeeded as expected Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 6981ea24b0f4598c7a5573e9 Clicked on Search button Clicked on Search button Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null zipcode accepted by API: 110001

testcase.name: purchaseApi
testcase.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 100.0 ✅ Boundary amount provided explicitly: 100.0 Generated First Name: johne89 Purchase created successfully with ID: 6981ea58b0f4598c7a55775b Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true PASS → Payment succeeded as expected Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 6981ea58b0f4598c7a55775b Clicked on Search button Clicked on Search button Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null zipcode accepted by API: 560001
